name: German Puffed Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Melt the butter/margarine in two pie pans or plates.
3. In a blender, blend together the eggs, flour, and milk until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into the pans/plates on top of the melted butter/margarine.
5. Bake in the oven for 15 minutes, watching as the pancakes rise up the sides of the pan.
Notes: Serve with your favorite toppings such as whipped cream and fruit, powdered sugar, maple syrup, etc.
